name: karakeep
title: Karakeep
description: AI-powered bookmark manager for links, notes, images, and PDFs. Auto-tags and summarizes saved content using local LLMs (Ollama) or cloud AI. Full-text search, browser extension, and mobile app.

variables.name: KARAKEEP_NEXTAUTH_SECRET
variables.label: Auth Secret
variables.description: Random secret for session encryption (generate with: openssl rand -base64 36)
